rulings.Case Title: JOHN MCHUGH et al VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel St. Francis Hotel Corporation To Produce Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel St. Francis Hotel Corp. to produce custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents is off calendar. Defendant St. Francis Hotel Corp. was dismissed September 6, 2013. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: EMIL DOLNER et al VS. PNEUMO ABEX LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Defendant Dana Companies, Llcs Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Francis Dolner; And To Compel Documents Pursuant To Notice Of Deposition; And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC¿s joinder to Dana Companies, LLC¿s motion to compel deposition of plaintiff Frances Dolner and document production and request for monetary sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m., not 9:00a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
